lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Captain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. How are you doing?

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Not bad. It's better than being at that blasted camp, though I do wish I had my own ship.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope you're not considering mutiny!

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Never, Captain!

sections.title: At port as a crew member

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Need a hand, Captain?

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: That cargo hold's already empty, Captain.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Ah, time to stretch my legs!

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Job's done, Captain! Everything from your cargo hold is now in your bank.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: The bank won't take anything from your cargo hold at the moment. Damn bureaucrats...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you getting on?

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Doing well, thanks! Anything like this beats being behind a desk anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd best be off.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: This really is my passion.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Life is easier on the sea.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: This is so much better than being cooped up in that camp.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: I'm just happy to be here.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: This reminds me of my last holiday.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: All looking good on the sails.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: I can see something to the [compass direction]!

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Trimmed those sails good and proper, Captain!

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: I can't find any ammo in the cargo hold.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Sailing was supposed to be peaceful.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: I can't attack your target, Captain.

sections.title: Randomly, while at the salvaging hook

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: One man's rubbish...

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Managed to hook some salvage! I'll put it in the cargo hold.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: The cargo hold is full. I can't salvage anything.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: I've caught a wind mote!

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Enabling the wind catcher!

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Disabling the wind catcher!

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: Aye, that's better.

lines.speaker: Ex-Captain Siad
lines.text: I can't find any repair kits in the cargo hold.
